2605.20955.caption:
Figure 3:The DrawMotion framework consists of the diffusion process (left) and the network structure (right).
1) The diffusion process includes a forward and a reverse process. In the forward process, original motions are augmented with Gaussian noise and fed into DrawMotion, which learns to predict the added noise based on textual descriptions and hand-drawn sketches. In the reverse process, user-provided textual descriptions and hand-drawn sketches are input into DrawMotion, enabling the gradual generation of motion sequences using the predicted noise.
2) In the DrawMotion architecture, both the stickman encoder and the text encoder are frozen, while the remaining modules are trainable. Encoded inputs are processed by multiple Multi-Condition Modules (MCMs) to get the final output.
2605.20955.caption_zh: 图3：DrawMotion框架由扩散过程（左）与网络结构（右）组成。1) 扩散过程包含前向过程与逆向过程。在前向过程中，原始动作数据通过添加高斯噪声进行增强，并输入DrawMotion，该模型学习基于文本描述和手绘草图来预测所添加的噪声。在逆向过程中，用户提供的文本描述和手绘草图被输入DrawMotion，使其能够利用预测的噪声逐步生成动作序列。2) 在DrawMotion架构中，骨架编码器与文本编码器均被冻结，其余模块可训练。编码后的输入经多个多条件模块（MCM）处理，以得到最终输出。

2605.20955.caption: Figure 1:Pipeline of DrawMotion inference. In addition to the training-based guidance, a training-free guidance updates the intermediate feature of the model within the MD boundary to ensure that the generations meet the conditions while maintaining its fidelity.
2605.20955.caption_zh: 图1：DrawMotion推理流程。除基于训练的引导外，一种免训练的引导方法在MD边界内更新模型的中间特征，以确保生成结果在满足条件的同时保持其保真度。

2605.20955.caption: Figure 4:Conceptual illustration of intermediate feature distributions. The dashed lines correspond to level sets of the probability density function. (a) Ordinary models yield discrete clusters, (b) MCM forms a relatively continuous space, and (c) VAE enforces full latent coverage. This schematic is supported by TableI.
2605.20955.caption_zh: 图4：中间特征分布的概念示意图。虚线对应于概率密度函数的等高线。(a) 普通模型产生离散的簇，(b) MCM 形成相对连续的空间，(c) VAE 强制实现完全的隐空间覆盖。此示意图由表I提供支持。

2605.21131.caption: Figure 3:Architecture Overview.Image groups are first patchified into tokens using DINO[39]. These tokens are then fused with tokens encoded from optional modalities through a modal attention layer, followed by frame attention and global attention layers. In global attention, bidirectional attention operates within each group, while causal attention is applied across groups. The fused tokens are finally decoded into global point maps, represented by a local point map using DPT head[43]and camera extrinsics with our anchor-free (AF) camera head. To control model complexity, modal attention is applied four times.
2605.21131.caption_zh: 图 3：架构概览。图像组首先通过 DINO[39] 划分为补丁并转换为标记。随后，这些标记通过模态注意力层与可选模态编码得到的标记进行融合，再经过帧注意力层和全局注意力层处理。在全局注意力中，双向注意力作用于各组内部，而因果注意力则应用于组间。融合后的标记最终通过 DPT 解码头[43]解码为全局点图，并利用我们的无锚点相机头结合相机外参表示为局部点图。为控制模型复杂度，模态注意力层共应用四次。

2605.21131.caption: Figure 5:Illustration of two types of attention layers, including (a) standard cross attention and (b) the proposed modal attention.
2605.21131.caption_zh: 图 5：两种注意力层的示意图，包括（a）标准交叉注意力与（b）所提出的模态注意力。

2605.21131.caption: Figure 4:Illustration of three types of attention mask, including (a) null mask, (b) standard causal mask, and (c) our group causal mask with a group size of 2. Entries marked as “-inf” indicate masked tokens. For simplicity, each token denotes one frame in this illustration.
2605.21131.caption_zh: 图4：三种注意力掩码示意图，包括（a）无掩码，（b）标准因果掩码，以及（c）本文提出的组因果掩码（组大小为2）。标记为“-inf”的条目表示被掩蔽的词元。为简化示意，此处每个词元代表一帧。

2605.21431.caption: Figure 2:The iTryOn architecture. (a) A DiT backbone with parallel injection of general context and 3D-hand guidance from our Interaction Guider. An action-aware constraint loss focuses training on interaction frames. (b) The Interaction Guider module fuses spatial features with global and action-specific text prompts. (c) Our A-RoPE mechanism aligns action captions to their corresponding video segments via unique rotational position encodings in temporal cross-attention.
2605.21431.caption_zh: 图 2：iTryOn 架构。(a) 采用 DiT 骨干网络，并行注入通用上下文及来自交互引导模块的 3D 手部引导；动作感知约束损失使训练聚焦于交互帧。(b) 交互引导模块将空间特征与全局及动作特定文本提示相融合。(c) 我们的 A-RoPE 机制通过时域交叉注意力中独特的旋转位置编码，将动作描述与其对应的视频片段对齐。

2605.21431.caption: Figure 3:Visual justification for our garment-agnostic 3D hand prior. Deriving a ”Hand Depth” prior from human parsing(Liet al.,2022)and video depth(Chenet al.,2025)suffers from critical information leakage. This flawed prior improperly retains source garment geometry, such as the sleeve cuff, leading directly to visible artifacts in the generated output. In contrast, our fully garment-agnostic 3D hand prior provides a clean signal, enabling the generation of plausible and artifact-free hand-garment contact. SeeAppendixA.3for more details.
2605.21431.caption_zh: 图3：本文所提出的服装无关3D手部先验的视觉依据。从人体解析（Li等，2022）和视频深度（Chen等，2025）中推导出的“手部深度”先验存在严重的信息泄露问题。这一有缺陷的先验不适当地保留了源服装的几何结构（例如袖口），直接导致生成结果中出现可见的伪影。相比之下，我们完全服装无关的3D手部先验提供了干净的信号，从而能够生成合理且无伪影的手部-服装接触效果。更多细节见附录A.3。

2605.21431.caption: Figure 6:Visual motivation for our Action-aware Semantic Guidance. These examples from our VVT-Interact dataset highlight the semantic ambiguity of VLM-generated global captions. Although the ground-truth interactions are distinct (rolling sleeves vs. adjusting the hem), both are imprecisely described with the generic verb ”adjusts”. Our categorical action captions resolve this ambiguity, providing the model with a clear and actionable signal required for high-fidelity interaction synthesis.
2605.21431.caption_zh: 图6：我们提出的动作感知语义引导机制的直观动机。这些来自VVT-Interact数据集的示例凸显了视觉语言模型生成的全局描述存在语义模糊性。尽管真实交互动作截然不同（卷起袖子 vs. 调整下摆边缘），两者均被笼统地描述为通用动词“调整”。我们的分类化动作描述则解决了这种模糊性，为模型提供了实现高保真交互合成所需的清晰且可操作信号。
